summary: Successfully generated a composable Button component with primary/secondary/ghost variants, sm/md/lg sizes, loading state with spinner, and left/right icon slots. The component uses forwardRef, is keyboard accessible, and follows Radix/shadcn API patterns.
nextSteps: Add Storybook stories for visual documentation
Implement full asChild pattern using a Slot utility
Set up a documentation site with live examples
Add CSS custom property theming support
Add component to a design system package
